source_jobs.description:
<h3 style="text-align: left; line-height: 1.4;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 2">About MAIA</span></span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:180,&quot;335572079&quot;:6,&quot;335572080&quot;:6,&quot;335572081&quot;:0,&quot;469789806&quot;:&quot;single&quot;}">&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="none"><br><br style="font-weight: 400;"><span class="TextRun SCXW102792596 BCX8" lang="EN-US" style="font-weight: 400;" data-contrast="none"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102792596 BCX8">MAIA is our next leap in AI, an&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun ContextualSpellingAndGrammarErrorV2Themed SCXW102792596 BCX8">always-available</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102792596 BCX8">&nbsp;assistant that amplifies human insight. By integrating directly into our workflows, it turns AI into true Augmented Intelligence, extending our creativity, judgment, and&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102792596 BCX8">expertise</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102792596 BCX8">. Built on a multi-agent framework, MAIA connects specialized tools, data sources, and reasoning systems through one interface, so you can do more, think deeper, and deliver sharper outcomes for clients.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW102792596 BCX8" style="font-weight: 400;" data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:180,&quot;335559739&quot;:180}">&nbsp;<br></span></span></span></h3>
